name: Revani
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour.
2. Mix flour with farina, baking soda, and baking powder.
3. Cream butter until very light and add vanilla; beat again.
4. Beat egg yolks in a bowl with sugar until very thick.
5. Add the butter mixture to the egg yolk mixture, beating thoroughly.
6. Beat egg whites in another bowl until stiff.
7. Fold the beaten egg whites alternately into the butter mixture.
8. Pour batter into a buttered pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
10. In a saucepan, boil sugar and water together for 5 minutes.
11. Remove froth from syrup.
12. Slowly pour hot syrup over the cake while cooling.
13. Serve.
